summary: Testing of bug fixes and new features: RSS feeds endpoint corrected, Forms page consolidated with new title, Navigation includes CMS tiles, Executive Training PPT edit/delete. All 15 backend tests passed. 9 frontend tests passed with intermittent login rate limiting on remaining tests (not functional bugs).

minor.issue: Route ordering issue - /uploaded/bulk matches /uploaded/{presentation_id} with 'bulk' as ID. Needs route reordering in backend.

regression_results.note: 1 failure is intermittent login timeout due to rate limiting, not functional bug

action_items: LOW: Reorder routes in /app/backend/routes/executive_training.py - move @router.delete('/uploaded/bulk') BEFORE @router.delete('/uploaded/{presentation_id}') to fix route matching

success_rate.frontend: 85% - intermittent login rate limiting, not functional bugs

seed_data_creation: Test data created with unique UUIDs and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working. RSS feeds API path corrected to /api/content/news/rss-feeds. Forms page title changed to 'Forms' and shows consolidated view with Contact Forms and Access Requests tabs. Navigation endpoint now includes published CMS tiles. Toast notifications have closeButton and 3 second duration. Executive Training PPT edit/delete endpoints exist but bulk delete has route ordering issue (LOW priority). Login rate limiting causes intermittent test failures - these are flaky tests, not functional issues.
api_endpoints_verified: GET /api/content/news/rss-feeds - Corrected path, returns feeds list
GET /api/navigation/public - Returns nav items including CMS tiles
